name: normalization_run_id
description: Normalization run ID that produced this relationship.

name: source_thread_id
description: Source thread ID for lineage and support counts.

name: passage_score
description: Claim-local passage score used as a support weight.

name: thread_score
description: Thread-level score kept separate from passage score.

name: thread_comment_count
description: Thread-level comment count kept separate from passage score.

name: active
description: Whether this relationship belongs to the active JTBD Taxonomy.
